report_name: NYDFS Warns Financial Firms of 'Frontier AI' Accelerating Cyberattacks

tools.name: Frontier AI
tools.description: Advanced AI models that can amplify the potency, scale, and speed of identifying vulnerabilities and developing exploits. NYDFS warns these models will lower the barrier for less-skilled actors and empower advanced actors to create novel exploits more quickly.

identities.name: New York State Department of Financial Services
identities.description: A U.S. financial regulator that issued industry letters warning regulated entities about the emerging cybersecurity threats posed by 'frontier AI' models.

identities.name: Financial Services Sector
identities.description: The collective of entities regulated by NYDFS, including banks, insurance companies, virtual currency businesses, and mortgage lenders, who are the intended audience of the cybersecurity advisories on AI risks.
